title: Explosives Expanded
description:
Get ready to blow the world with more explosives!
Using this mod does a lot more then just an explosive mod.
body:
Want new explosives? Ever wanted new things to Blow up the world? Well now you can make the world look like its a PVP world. With New items like C4, Cluster C4, Pipebomb, and dynamite.

Or use it to terraform the land with ease, use to make mining the nether easy or use in your mineshafts.

New items
![explosives added to the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a110be8b1bf8fb8432e01516b7d42f1c29be6b0.png)
